scripts.preinstall: node -e "['package-lock.json', 'yarn.lock'].forEach(f => require('fs').existsSync(f) && require('fs').unlinkSync(f)); if (!process.env.npm_config_user_agent?.startsWith('pnpm/')) { console.error('Use pnpm instead'); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --filter "!@workspace/mockup-sandbox" --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "!@workspace/mockup-sandbox" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
scripts.dev: pnpm run clean && echo 'Starting dev environment...' && concurrently --raw "pnpm run dev:backend" "pnpm run dev:frontend"
